x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Assessment templates define the structure for vendor evaluations that Now Assist uses to generate AI-assisted scoring and summaries. Well-configured templates improve the accuracy and consistency of AI-generated assessment outputs.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure assessment templates in TPRM to standardize vendor evaluations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Assessment templates define the structure for vendor evaluations that Now Assist uses to generate AI-assisted scoring and summaries. Well-configured templates improve the accuracy and consistency of AI-generated assessment outputs.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Assessment Templates Configured</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_template");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=3)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" templates",finding:c+" assessment templates configured."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" templates",finding:c+" template(s) found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 templates",finding:"No assessment templates configured."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>TPRM</module>
<number>CHK0006212</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Configure assessment templates in TPRM to standardize vendor evaluations.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb5</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
